# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: myapplication
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes
version: 0.1.0

sources:
  - https://example.com/myapplication

dependencies: []

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapplication
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapplication
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapplication
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: myapplication
          image: myapplication:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: myapplication
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: myapplication

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: myapplication
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "false"
spec:
  rules:
    - host: ""
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: myapplication
                port:
                  number: 80
